response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise in capital markets, and any clear exposure to fixed income or investment banking domains — all mandatory requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong dev-ops and CI/CD practices demonstrated through multiple roles
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
SQL experience listed but not tied to financial systems or high-volume trading databases
Zero mention of fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge
